src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:export default function DisputesView({ isDarkMode, cardClasses, textMutedClasses, hoverClasses, onAction }: ViewProps) {
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:  const { token } = useAuth();
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:  const [disputes, setDisputes] = useState<any[]>([]);
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:  const [selectedDispute, setSelectedDispute] = useState<any>(null);

src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:  const fetchDisputes = async () => {
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    if (!token) return;
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    try {
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      const res = await fetch('/api/admin/disputes', {
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}` }
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      });
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      const data = await res.json();
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      setDisputes(Array.isArray(data) ? data : []);
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      console.error('Error fetching disputes:', error);
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    }
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:  };
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    fetchDisputes();
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:  }, [token]);
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:  const handleResolve = async (id: string, resolution: string) => {
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    if (!token) return;

src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/disputes/${id}/resolve`, {

src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:          'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`

src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      });

src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:        onAction?.(`Dispute resolved with: ${resolution}`);
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      }
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      onAction?.('Failed to resolve dispute');
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      setSubmitting(false);
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    }
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:  };
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:  return (
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:    <div className="space-y-6">
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:        <div>
src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">Disputes & Resolutions</h1>

src/components/admin/views/DisputesView.tsx:        </div>

src/components/marketplace/MapTracking.tsx:    const eventName = `location_${artisanId}`;
src/components/marketplace/MapTracking.tsx:    socket.on(eventName, (data: { lat: number, lng: number }) => {

src/components/marketplace/ChatModal.tsx:      .then(data => {

src/components/marketplace/ChatModal.tsx:        // Mark unread messages as read

src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:import { socket } from '../../services/socket';
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:interface Notification {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  id: string;
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  type: 'push' | 'email' | 'reminder';
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  title: string;
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  message: string;
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  is_read: boolean;
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  created_at: string;
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:}
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:export default function NotificationBell({ userId, token, onNotification }: { userId: string, token: string | null, onNotification?: (notification: Notification) => void }) {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([]);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    if (!userId || !token) return;
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    // Fetch initial notifications
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    fetch(`/api/notifications/${userId}`, {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      headers: {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:        'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      }
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    })
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      .then(res => {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${res.status}`);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:        return res.json();
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      })
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      .then(data => {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:        if (Array.isArray(data)) {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:          setNotifications(data);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:          setUnreadCount(data.filter((n: any) => !n.is_read).length);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:        } else {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:          console.error("Notifications data is not an array:", data);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:          setNotifications([]);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:          setUnreadCount(0);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:        }
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      })
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      .catch(err => console.error("Failed to load notifications", err));
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    // Listen for real-time notifications on the shared socket
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    socket.on('new_notification', (notification: Notification) => {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      if (!notification) return;
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev]);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      // Call the callback if provided
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      onNotification?.(notification);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      // Show browser notification if permitted
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      if (Notification.permission === 'granted') {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:        new Notification(notification.title, { body: notification.message });
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      }
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    });
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    // Request notification permission
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    if (Notification.permission === 'default') {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      Notification.requestPermission();
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    }
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    return () => {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      socket.off('new_notification');
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    };
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  }, [userId, token]);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  const markAsRead = async (id: string) => {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    if (!token) return;
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    try {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      await fetch(`/api/notifications/${id}/read`, { 
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:        method: 'POST',
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:        headers: {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:          'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:        }
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      });
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      setNotifications(prev => prev?.map(n => n.id === id ? { ...n, is_read: true } : n));
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:      console.error("Failed to mark notification as read", err);
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:    }
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  };
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  const getIcon = (type: string) => {

src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:
src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx:  return (

src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:const CategoryIcon = ({ name, size = 20, className = "" }: { name?: string, size?: number, className?: string }) => {
src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:  const iconProps: any = { className: `transition-transform group-hover:scale-110 ${className}` };
src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:  if (!className || className === "") {

src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:  if (!name) return <Hammer {...iconProps} />;
src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:  
src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:  switch (name.toLowerCase()) {

src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:    case 'electrical': return <Zap {...iconProps} />;

src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:    case 'carpentry': return <Hammer {...iconProps} />;
src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:    case 'construction': return <HardHat {...iconProps} />;
src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:    case 'smart home': return <Smartphone {...iconProps} />;
src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:    default: return <Hammer {...iconProps} />;
src/components/common/CategoryIcon.tsx:  }

src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:import React from 'react';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:interface PasswordStrengthIndicatorProps {
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:  password: string;
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:}
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:export const PasswordStrengthIndicator: React.FC<PasswordStrengthIndicatorProps> = ({ password }) => {
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:  const getStrength = (pass: string) => {
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    if (!pass) return 0;
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    let strength = 0;
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    if (pass.length >= 6) strength += 1;
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    if (pass.length >= 8 && /[0-9]/.test(pass)) strength += 1;
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    if (pass.length >= 10 && /[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(pass)) strength += 1;
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    if (pass.length >= 12 && /[A-Z]/.test(pass) && /[a-z]/.test(pass)) strength += 1;
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    return Math.min(strength, 4);
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:  };
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:  const strength = getStrength(password);
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:  
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:  const getLabel = (s: number) => {
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    switch (s) {
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      case 0: return '';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      case 1: return 'Weak';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      case 2: return 'Fair';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      case 3: return 'Good';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      case 4: return 'Strong';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      default: return '';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    }
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:  };
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:  const getColor = (s: number) => {
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    switch (s) {
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      case 1: return 'bg-red-500';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      case 2: return 'bg-orange-500';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      case 3: return 'bg-yellow-500';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      case 4: return 'bg-emerald-500';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      default: return 'bg-white/10';
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    }
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:  };
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:  if (!password) return null;
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:  return (
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:    <div className="mt-2 space-y-1">
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:      <div className="flex justify-between items-center px-1">
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:        <span className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-white/30">Strength</span>
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:        <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest ${
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:          strength === 1 ? 'text-red-500' : 
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:          strength === 2 ? 'text-orange-500' : 
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:          strength === 3 ? 'text-yellow-500' : 
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:          'text-emerald-500'
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:        }`}>
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:          {getLabel(strength)}
src/components/auth/PasswordStrengthIndicator.tsx:        </span>

src/pages/PhoneDashboard.tsx:      navigate('/phone-auth');
src/pages/PhoneDashboard.tsx:    }
src/pages/PhoneDashboard.tsx:  }, [user, isLoading, navigate]);
src/pages/PhoneDashboard.tsx:
src/pages/PhoneDashboard.tsx:  const handleLogout = async () => {
src/pages/PhoneDashboard.tsx:    await logout();

src/pages/PhoneDashboard.tsx:  };

src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:export default function AutoDevis() {
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:  const { t } = useTranslation();
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    serviceType: '',
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    description: '',
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    city: 'Casablanca',
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    urgency: 'Normal'
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:  });
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:  const [estimate, setEstimate] = useState<any>(null);
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:  const handleEstimate = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    if (!formData.serviceType || !formData.description) return;
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    try {
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:      const result = await aiService.getAutoEstimate(
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:        formData.serviceType, 
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:        formData.description, 
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:        formData.city, 
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:        formData.urgency
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:      );
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:      setEstimate(result);
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:      console.error(error);
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    } finally {
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    }
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:  };
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:  return (
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:    <Layout>
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:      <div className="min-h-screen bg-[var(--bg)] text-[var(--text)] pb-20">
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:        <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto p-6 space-y-8">

src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:                <input 
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:                  type="text"

src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({...formData, serviceType: e.target.value})}
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:                  className="w-full bg-[var(--card-bg)] border border-[var(--border)] rounded-2xl py-4 pl-12 pr-4 focus:outline-none focus:border-[var(--accent)]/50 transition-all text-sm text-[var(--text)]"
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:                  required
src/pages/AutoDevis.tsx:                />

src/i18n.ts:

src/i18n.ts:  .use(LanguageDetector)

src/i18n.ts:  .init({
src/i18n.ts:    fallbackLng: 'en',
src/i18n.ts:    supportedLngs: ['en', 'fr', 'ar'],
src/i18n.ts:    load: 'languageOnly',
src/i18n.ts:    debug: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development',

src/i18n.ts:    },

src/i18n.ts:
src/i18n.ts:// Handle RTL/LTR
src/i18n.ts:const applyRtl = (lng: string) => {
src/i18n.ts:  if (!lng) return;
src/i18n.ts:  // Fast path for Arabic to prevent flickering
src/i18n.ts:  if (lng.startsWith('ar')) {
src/i18n.ts:    document.documentElement.dir = 'rtl';
src/i18n.ts:    document.documentElement.lang = lng;
src/i18n.ts:  } else {
src/i18n.ts:    document.documentElement.dir = 'ltr';
src/i18n.ts:    document.documentElement.lang = lng;
src/i18n.ts:  }
src/i18n.ts:};
src/i18n.ts:
src/i18n.ts:i18n.on('languageChanged', applyRtl);
src/i18n.ts:i18n.on('initialized', () => applyRtl(i18n.language));
src/i18n.ts:
src/i18n.ts:export default i18n;
src/lib/utils.ts:import { clsx, type ClassValue } from "clsx"
src/lib/utils.ts:import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge"
src/lib/utils.ts:
src/lib/utils.ts:export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
src/lib/utils.ts:  return twMerge(clsx(inputs))
src/lib/utils.ts:}
src/lib/utils.ts:
src/lib/utils.ts:export function calculateDistance(lat1: number, lon1: number, lat2: number, lon2: number) {
src/lib/utils.ts:  const R = 6371; // Radius of the earth in km
src/lib/utils.ts:  const dLat = deg2rad(lat2 - lat1);
src/lib/utils.ts:  const dLon = deg2rad(lon2 - lon1);
src/lib/utils.ts:  const a =
src/lib/utils.ts:    Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) +
src/lib/utils.ts:    Math.cos(deg2rad(lat1)) * Math.cos(deg2rad(lat2)) *
src/lib/utils.ts:    Math.sin(dLon / 2) * Math.sin(dLon / 2);
src/lib/utils.ts:  const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
src/lib/utils.ts:  const d = R * c; // Distance in km
src/lib/utils.ts:  return d;
src/lib/utils.ts:}
src/lib/utils.ts:
src/lib/utils.ts:function deg2rad(deg: number) {
src/lib/utils.ts:  return deg * (Math.PI / 180);
src/lib/utils.ts:}
src/lib/utils.ts:
src/lib/utils.ts:export function formatDuration(startedAt: string, end: Date | string) {
src/lib/utils.ts:  const start = new Date(startedAt).getTime();
src/lib/utils.ts:  const endTime = new Date(end).getTime();
src/lib/utils.ts:  const diff = Math.max(0, endTime - start);
src/lib/utils.ts:  
src/lib/utils.ts:  const hours = Math.floor(diff / (1000 * 60 * 60));
src/lib/utils.ts:  const minutes = Math.floor((diff % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));
src/lib/utils.ts:  const seconds = Math.floor((diff % (1000 * 60)) / 1000);
src/lib/utils.ts:  
src/lib/utils.ts:  if (hours > 0) {
src/lib/utils.ts:    return `${hours.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
src/lib/utils.ts:  }
src/lib/utils.ts:  return `${minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
src/lib/utils.ts:}

scripts/merge_locales.cjs:const updateLocale = (filePath, additions) => {
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:  try {
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:    let data = {};
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:    if (fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:      data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8'));
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:    }
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:    const merged = { ...data, ...additions };
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:    fs.writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(merged, null, 2));
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:    console.log(`Updated ${filePath}`);
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:  } catch (err) {
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:    console.error(`Error updating ${filePath}`, err);
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:  }
scripts/merge_locales.cjs:};
